name: WireGuard
description: WireGuard VPN client manager. Place .conf files on your SD card to connect.
author: aaronearles

changelog.v0.1.4: Dump env and find minui tools for display path discovery
changelog.v0.1.3: Add set -x trace log for diagnostics
changelog.v0.1.2: Default log to SD card so it persists across reboots
changelog.v0.1.1: Fix display tool discovery for NextUI system paths
